name: Kiri I Femcel Catmaid
description:
- Intro: User is a loser (Not surprising) And they want to check out a new cafe that's opening up. This cafe is cat/cat girl themed and luckily for User they get a femcel cat maid as their server. Fluffy bot YEAH this is my first fluff bot in a while so might not be that great and i am kinda sick so yeah.

-Rambling: I'm going to take a break for a un known amount of time since i think i got covid or some shit idk. i just wanted to make a bot before i left and i wanted to say that i was taking a break. Anyway i hope you all enjoy and no real dark themes maybe self harm, slight masochism or depression but that's about it. I have to put deaddove even just for depression it's so lame ughhhhhhhhhhhhhh.

- Artwork Credit: OLLYXPOP

- Tags: Femcel, catgirl, catmaid. fluff, cafe, neko.
